reviews.review_text:
I remember the first time I saw Gang Beasts, I watched as my brother played several rounds of rag-doll WWE and laughed a lot in those 20minutes. I decided then and there I would purchase this game for myself.

This game is basically 3D Smash Bros, but everyone is drunk and their only ability is sh*tting their pants. Highly recommended.

This game will never get the credit it deserves for pretty much creating its own sub-genre of wobbly-ragdoll physics characters.

punch friend. friend fall off map. everyone laugh. victory twerk. 

asserted dominance
very fun gameplay funny glitches i think you should play it and try it out

Really fun to play with friends! The crazy physics and random moments make every match different, and there is always something funny happening. It’s one of those games that can turn a normal session into hours of laughs. Definitely recommend it if you want a fun game to enjoy with friends.
This game made me nut viciously, I've never felt hornier and honestly if you want sex filled fun with friends then this is the game for you! I keep a nut jar of gang beasts!
half the time youll spend on the game will be spent trying to join your friends when you can join its fun but it takes straight years
games barely working, please fix your lobbies and matchmaking

fun but the knock out physics just killed the vibe for me. and yes i know its probably a core part of the game but it gets to a point where i just get domed, knocked out, and killed in 3 seconds with nothing i can do about it, which just ruins it for me.
Cool game, but the the controls and navigating the main menu is hell
Best ragdoll game oat ts might be goated af the only bad thing is the long waiting time in online games

Gang Beasts is absolutely hilarious and way more fun than it has any right to be. The goofy physics make every match chaotic and unpredictable, and it's perfect for killing time with friends. Definitely recommend it if u wanna laugh until ur stomach hurts. 😂👊🎮
the game is apsolutly hlarious and the game play is amazing g

It's so much fun to play with friends! The wacky physics and random moments make every match different, and something funny always happens. It's one of those games that can turn a normal round into hours of laughter. I definitely recommend it if you want to enjoy a fun game with friends.
Beating the crap out of your buds With a running head butt. While dressed as a chicken. And then picking them up and throwing them off a balcony. Has never been more fun or invigorating.

straightforward game however there's nothin wrong with a game being gayforward. Happy Pride
its a really funny game with a lot of glitches and multiplayer so you can play with your friends and bro you will laugh
Such a fun game to experience with your friends. I've always liked this game over than Party Animals, lol. 10/10

this game is peak its super good and its fun and with friends  in a call its super funny you should play this game its super good
I really like this game because with all the sillly things you can do and friends make it so much better this is the best 8-30 dollars ive ever spent

Pretty interesting game. The controls are a bit clunky (I use an Xbox controller), but that's part of the fun of the game. It's not meant to be precise. Loading into matches was a problem sometimes, but the experience made it worth it. 3.5 stars.
i have been playin this game for over 4 years and it is arguably one of the best ragdoll games there are today.
this game is really fun but stupid odricky is a camper if you ever see him destroy him at once
Gang Beasts is actually crazy for how well it still holds up. It’s almost 10 years old and still fun as hell with friends.

With friends and family, 10/10

Waves mode, eh, could use a lot more maps 7/10

Everything else is 10/10
One of the best games ever its so funny! It looks like drunk blind guys fighting🤣

it is a good game, glad to be able to play online for free instead of having to pay for ps plus on my playstation and if you go into a game by yourself you can spawn items like, big bots, medium bots, boxes, bins, etc it's a shame there's no steam workshop for this game would recommend!
this game is really fun with friends and by yourself. its super fun if you learn how to do tricks
its a very fun to play with friends and there are so many different modes you can play by yourself, public, and your friends
Great game to play with friends. WOuld pick this up to bond and have fun with friends. Able to run at 1080p 165hz
Still the GOAT of the genre and going strong, party animals was a flop years before it came out due to delays, and the best state it had was the beta. Gang beasts on top.
very fun game to play with friends nothing more really to say here hopefuly we get more maps in the future that would be super goated 9/10
Goofy little fighting game. Really fun and funny. Would recommend.
very fun as a party game with friends. it is not crossplay for all consoles. PS and Nintendo can play online together, while Xbox and PC can play online together.
its just fun idk how to describe it, its also the funniest game i played
I prefer mods with this game but i'm pretty sure we all want the updated buildings even tho i have this game on console pc is better

how, literally HOW does this ♥♥♥♥♥♥ game have 85% positive reviews??? Nothing, fking NOTING works. I can't join a lobby with my friends, The control mapping is a freaking joke. It says to change the skin color you have to press arrow keys or A/D, but actually you need to use your scroll wheel. Little things like this. Also, the biggest joke: If you press "Quit Game", the game completely freezes, you cannot close it, not even Alt +F4 works. During that time, it uses MORE THAN FKING 7 GIGS of RAM. HOW??? Do not buy this stupid game, even if it looks fun and is 75% off.
Controls so bad that me and my friends refunded it five minutes without even getting to playing.

Bought it on sale with my friends as we used to play the xbox pc game pass version and it ran like absolute garbage and suprisingly the xbox version was more optimised 

I do NOT recommend
cant make a 2 player lobby without it matchmaking for other players, i just want to play with me and my friend alone. really annoying

mid game has some cool maps but thats about it. controller needed to play, terrible controls buggy hats that you grab onto instead of enemies boring gameplay loop overall. fun for the first 30 minutes not worth the money though. needs progression or something because fighting your friends doesnt last very long and frankly this game would be better off 5 dollars than 30 for a crap buggy game

Controls are terrible on PC. I love this game on console, but I have no idea why they decided to make it available on PC if they weren't going to do anything to make it actually playable on keyboard. Default keybinds make no sense, navigating menus often selects the wrong buttons and is unintuitive, and multiplayer is extremely difficult to work with. My friends and I had to refund it because it simply wasn't working for us, nobody could figure out how to control the characters and menus even though we had lots of experience with the console version. If you're gonna buy this, either play it on console or buy a controller to hook up to your PC.

Even though this looks like a great game, I couldn't join any lobby without having issues such as not seeing others or just not connecting at all or it taking lots of time and me having to restart my game a lot. Was really annoying.

Great party game and a lot of fun and laughs to be had but the gameplay and mechanics need to be improved in my honest opinion, maybe in a sequel. But this is a very wholesome game, there needs to be more games like this to be made. I just wish there was more content added.

i love this game so much its the best game of my life i would die and come back to life as a cow to get my organs harvested just to reincarnate and play this game again its so fun its the best experience of my life the people on here are angels and everyone and the fighting physics are so good oh my lord im gooning to the fighting physics this is the best game of all time i would rather be tortured than not be able to play this for the rest of my life you dont understand how life impacting this game is i would die to play this for the first time oh my god its so amazing i goon to this everday genuinely thats how good this is u can also pull some main chracter stuff and become spiderman and stuff oh my god and its so cinematic when u are fighting the other last person alive, 10/10 game would recommend if you love hot femboy twinks or any gender person i love this so much

Trying to play this game as of May 17th with more that 4 people is actually impossible. You can't even use a previous version as the matchmaker tells you to use the most current version. This game is really fun but this is very disappointing. Please fix this.
really fun frriends and witjout and DONT FORGET IM INVINCIBLE TUNG TUNG TUNG SAHUR

it was a good game at one point and im sure people enjoy it, but i find the controls too unsatisfying, its hard to tell what you're doing, and it feels like there's a whole second of input lag from the controller, plus a myriad of bugs that never got patched
ironic developer is rocket science since thats what u need a degree in just to get a multiplayer game going

I just want to play this game with friends when I bring my steam deck to friends' houses for game night but no matter what I do the sound for this game in particular only comes out of the deck even when outputting to the TV. Steam deck verified...what a joke.

It's just not fun. You don't really feel like you have any control over what you do, you can't limit matches to just your friends, the German translation is awful, there's no tutorial, heck, for Controllers the only "Input" setting is "Vibration". This is a game you can play if you're drunk but I don't really feel like you have any agency in this.

the game is very hard to play as when connecting to a game with players from other regions i go to really high ping which makes online play impossible from the uk as im never matching with players in the same region as me.
